Package egovframework.let.main.web

Class EgovMainController

java.lang.Object
egovframework.let.main.web.EgovMainController
@Controller @SessionAttributes(types=ComDefaultVO.class) public class EgovMainController extends Object
템플릿 메인 페이지 컨트롤러 클래스(Sample 소스)
Since:
2011.08.31
Version:
1.0
Author:
실행환경 개발팀 JJY

    • selectHeader

      @RequestMapping("/sym/mms/EgovHeader.do") public String selectHeader(@ModelAttribute("menuManageVO") MenuManageVO menuManageVO, @RequestParam(value="flag",required=false) String flag, org.springframework.ui.ModelMap model) throws Exception
